Policy posture

exception required

Compliance score: 68%

Approvals

2 roles
  • manager: Operational exception requires manager approval Required.
  • finance: Lodging cap exception requires finance review Required.

Policy findings

1 issues
  • lodging: Selected lodging exceeds the nightly cap but includes an operational-safety justification. (warning)

Preferred alternatives

1 options
  • lodging: Use the attached lower-cost comparable if the exception is denied. Preserves site access with a lower nightly cost ceiling.

Exception guidance

2 notes
  • Retain the lower-cost comparable in the approval packet.
  • Document the operational-safety rationale in the manager approval request.

Policy notes

1 updates
  • Proposal is exception-eligible if the fatigue-management rationale is approved.
